description: A marketing manager wants to send a promotional email for a new product line to all customers who have previously purchased from a related category.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of customers who have purchased items from the 'Outdoor Gear' category.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a target audience segment.
Agent retrieves the correct email content.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the email to be sent to the generated customer list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the email campaign.
